_comment: DataSourceVectorial (SVG vector source) is supported in v10/v11/v12 but ABSENT in v9 and v8.1, confirmed by compatibility testing. The feature disappears at the v10->v9 boundary, so it is dropped HERE. Composition unions this into ANY chain ending at v9 or below (v9, v8.1), so both targets handle it. The engine's CASCADE_DROP rules (hbo_reserializer) then drop the now-source-less substance inputs / SVG fill layers so nothing dangles.
_comment_schema_add: DataActionSmudge is missing from the auto-generated v9 schema (no v9 sample uses the smudge tool), so a smudge layer downgraded to v9 isn't projected and v9 errors 'No value defined for DataActionSmudge.projDuplicates'. v12.1 dropped projDuplicates/stencilPostBlending (it carries changeFlags/strokes3D instead), so they must be synthesized. Member list = v9 DataActionPaint minus sourceColor (the v9 stroke-action family base). Mirrors the same fix at the v9->v8.1 boundary; this one covers the v9 target. defaults_add values are the genuine v9 DataActionPaint/Eraser defaults.
